name: Amazon Associates
description: The world's largest affiliate program. Promote millions of products across every category — from electronics and home goods to books and fashion. Tiered commission structure with up to 10% on select categories.
commission_rate: 1-10% (varies by category, up to 10% on luxury/beauty)

name: ShareASale
description: A powerhouse affiliate network connecting publishers with thousands of merchants across fashion, home, tech, and digital products. Known for transparent reporting, reliable payments.

name: CJ Affiliate (Commission Junction)
description: One of the most established affiliate networks, featuring premium advertisers like Nike, Office Depot, GoDaddy, and Apple. Deep analytics and advanced performance reporting.

name: Impact
description: A next-generation partnership management platform powering affiliate programs for thousands of global brands including Shopify, Uber, and Airbnb. Real-time tracking, AI-powered fraud detection.

name: ClickBank
description: The go-to marketplace for digital products — online courses, fitness programs, software, eBooks, and membership sites. Commission rates are among the highest, often 50-75%.

name: Rakuten Advertising
description: Formerly LinkShare, Rakuten is a premium global affiliate network featuring top-tier brands like Macy's, Walmart, Sephora, and Best Buy. Excellent for fashion, beauty, and electronics niches.

name: PartnerStack
description: A leading partnership automation platform for high-growth SaaS companies. Run affiliate and referral programs for businesses like Notion, Canva, and Webflow. Offers recurring subscription commissions.
